name: codex-swift
description: Accelerate Swift/iOS development with semantic analysis, incremental builds, Preview/Playground, simulator/device runs, and package discovery — all powered by the Swift toolchain.

interface.longDescription: Bridge Codex to the Swift toolchain with 21 MCP tools. SourceKit-LSP diagnostics, Xcode Bridge, 24-pattern semantic verification, 25+ architectural pattern detection (AVFoundation/ScreenCaptureKit), intent fulfillment checking, and simulator visual verification. Catches the bugs vibe-coding actually produces: empty actions, impossible states, stale async, silent error swallowing, and more.
defaultPrompt: Use Codex Swift to explore a SwiftUI view with live Preview.
Use Codex Swift to fix all compile errors in this project.
Use Codex Swift to find a Swift package for networking.
